entries.speaker: nella
lines:
Starbloom today — only grows where ley lines run
shallow. My grandmother said they're good luck.

entries.speaker: nella
lines:
The starblooms wilted overnight. All of them. I've
never seen that before.

entries.speaker: nella
lines:
I dry them now. Press flat, tie with string. People
buy anyway. I think they just want to remember what colour
looked like.

entries.speaker: nella
lines:
Look. Fresh starblooms. The first ones in months.
The petals are smaller, but they're real. They're growing again.
